product.name: AutoStream
product.description: AutoStream helps YouTube, Twitch, and podcast creators auto-publish, caption, and grow their audience with AI.
product.mission: Democratize professional video publishing for every creator on the planet.

basic.limitations: No custom branding, no translations, no API access

pro.limitations: No white-labeling, no SLA, no dedicated manager

enterprise.annual_price: Custom — contact sales for volume discounts

ai_captions.description: Auto-generated captions in 30+ languages using Whisper-grade accuracy

auto_publish.description: Schedule and publish to YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, LinkedIn simultaneously
auto_publish.scheduling: Publish immediately or schedule up to 90 days in advance
auto_publish.availability: All plans (platform count varies by plan)

analytics.description: Real-time viewer retention, engagement heatmaps, and growth trends

custom_branding.description: Add logo, colors, and intro/outro templates

engagement_heatmaps.description: Visual overlays showing which parts of your video viewers replay or skip

refund.summary: Full refund within 7 days, no questions asked. After 7 days, no refunds.
refund.details: Refund is processed within 3-5 business days back to your original payment method.
refund.exceptions: Enterprise plan refunds are governed by contract terms.

trial.summary: 14-day free trial, no credit card required
trial.conversion: Auto-converts to Basic plan after trial unless you upgrade or cancel.

support.pro: 24/7 live chat + email — response within 2 hours
support.enterprise: Dedicated account manager + phone + email — response within 30 minutes

cancel.details: Access continues until end of current billing period. No partial refunds for mid-cycle cancellations.

policies.data_privacy: AutoStream is GDPR and CCPA compliant. Data is stored in SOC 2 Type II certified infrastructure.
policies.uptime_sla: Enterprise plans include 99.9% uptime SLA. Best-effort for Basic and Pro.

faqs.can_i_upgrade: Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime. Prorated billing applied automatically.
faqs.team_members: Pro supports up to 3 seats. Enterprise is unlimited.
faqs.storage: Basic: 50GB. Pro: unlimited cloud storage. Enterprise: unlimited with dedicated infrastructure.
faqs.free_trial: Yes, 14-day free trial with full Pro features. No credit card needed.
faqs.video_formats: We accept MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM. Files up to 50GB per upload on Pro/Enterprise.
faqs.api_access: API access is available on Enterprise plans only. Documentation at docs.autostream.ai.
faqs.white_label: White-labeling (custom domain, branding, no AutoStream watermark) is available on Enterprise.
faqs.concurrent_streams: Pro supports up to 3 simultaneous streams. Enterprise is unlimited.
faqs.payment_methods: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfer for Enterprise.
faqs.can_i_pause: You can cancel and reactivate at any time. There is no 'pause' feature currently.
faqs.multi_language_captions: Yes — Pro and Enterprise plans support captions in 30+ languages with AI translation.

competitors.vs_streamyard: AutoStream offers AI captions and multi-platform publishing; StreamYard focuses on live streaming.
competitors.vs_riverside: AutoStream adds automated publishing and analytics; Riverside specializes in high-quality recording.
competitors.vs_repurpose_io: AutoStream is an all-in-one platform; Repurpose.io focuses on repurposing only.

support_contact.chat: Available in-app for Pro and Enterprise
